name: ACID Transactions
description: Use BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK to ensure atomic transfers and test rollback behavior

checks.name: Account 1 balance = 800.00
checks.query: SELECT balance FROM account_balances WHERE account_id = 1;

checks.name: Account 2 balance = 700.00
checks.query: SELECT balance FROM account_balances WHERE account_id = 2;

checks.name: Account 3 unchanged (rollback worked)
checks.query: SELECT balance FROM account_balances WHERE account_id = 3;
checks.description: Account 3 withdrawal attempt was rolled back — balance unchanged

checks.name: Total balance conserved
checks.query: SELECT SUM(balance) AS total FROM account_balances;
checks.description: Total money in the system must be conserved: 800+700+750=2250
